issues.message: <ActionMenu> is used without any of its sub-components.
<ActionMenu> is used without any of its sub-components.
<Inline> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Inline>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.
